about: Resolvent IT Services is a technology-drivensolutions partner dedicated to enablingorganizations to achieve operationalexcellence and digital maturity throughscalable, secure, and future-ready solutions.Established in March 2022 andheadquartered in Pune, Resolvent deliversintelligent automation, data-centric, anddigital-first services that help businessesadapt, grow, and compete in a rapidlyevolving digital landscape.With deep expertise across RPA, softwareengineering, cloud, and digital enablement,we accelerate enterprise growth and delivermeasurable business outcomes—fasterexecution, smarter operations, and costeffectivescalability.We proudly serve clients across multipleindustries, including BFSI & FinTech,Healthcare & Life Sciences, Manufacturing,Retail & E-commerce, and Education & Public Sector.
